response.justification: While Maria possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering and entrepreneurial experience, her profile aligns more with a hands-on Senior or Staff Full-Stack Developer than a Director-level Principal Engineer. Her exposure to AI is relatively recent, lacking the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic cloud/AI customer advisory experience required for this high-level strategy role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across multiple stacks and platforms.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and customer advisory experience expected for this seniority.
AI expertise appears recent and limited, missing the preferred 'recognized expertise in AI'.
Experience is heavily weighted towards full-stack web development rather than enterprise-scale AI platform strategy.
